title: Bombay Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bombay Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!
